payload.answer: I can help with this as a repair-choice request, but I won’t commit it as durable memory here. Choose one of the options below.
repair_options: Keep it as a temporary note only, not durable memory.
Store it as a separate memory item if you want weather observations tracked over time.
If this was meant to replace an earlier weather note, specify which earlier note should be superseded.
If you only want today’s current condition, rephrase with a date/time and location for clarity.
